best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-datadisplay-001 title: verify datadisplay displays correct data to localuser module: datadisplay source pages: 1 preconditions: localuser is logged in. test data: no specific data required. test steps: 1. localuser requests data from datadisplay. 2. datadisplay retrieves data from realtimedatabase. 3. datadisplay displays the retrieved data to localuser. expected result: datadisplay successfully displays the correct data to localuser.

test case id: tc-localuser-003 title: verify localuser can add and remove products from cart module: localuser source pages: 2 preconditions: localuser is logged in. test data: product name = "producta", price = 10.99 test steps: 1. localuser adds a product to their cart. 2. cart updates to include the new product. 3. localuser removes the product from their cart. 4. cart updates to exclude the product. expected result: cart correctly reflects the addition and removal of products.

test case id: tc-realtimedatabase-001 title: verify realtimedatabase can store and retrieve data module: realtimedatabase source pages: 1 preconditions: data to be stored exists. test data: data = "sample data" test steps: 1. realtimedatabase stores the data. 2. realtimedatabase retrieves the stored data. expected result: data is successfully stored and retrieved from realtimedatabase.

test case id: tc-user-001 title: verify user can log in and out module: user source pages: 2 preconditions: user credentials are valid. test data: username = "testuser", password = "testpass" test steps: 1. user attempts to log in using valid credentials. 2. authentication verifies the credentials. 3. user is logged in. 4. user logs out. expected result: user successfully logs in and out.
